tool.name: entropy_analyzer
tool.description: Analyze string entropy to identify potential secrets, keys, and random tokens.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect high-entropy strings that may be secrets - Analyze API keys and tokens for randomness - Identify passwords and credentials in code - Find base64-encoded secrets - Audit configuration files for exposed secrets

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The analysis action to perform: - analyze: Analyze entropy of a single string - scan_text: Scan text for high-entropy strings - classify: Classify string type based on characteristics

parameter.name: value
parameter.description: String value to analyze. Required for analyze action.

parameter.name: text
parameter.description: Text content to scan for secrets. Required for scan_text action.

parameter.name: threshold
parameter.description: Entropy threshold for detection (default: 4.0). Higher values = more selective.

returns.description: Entropy analysis including score, classification, and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Analyze a single string
analyze AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
# Scan text for secrets
scan_text api_key = 'sk_live_51H3...' 4.5
# Classify string type
classify eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9
